title: Refund Policy
content:
Cancellation Policy

We require a minimum of 24 hours' notice for all session cancellations. Sessions cancelled with less than 24 hours' notice will be charged at the full session rate. This policy ensures our tutors are compensated for reserved time and allows us to offer the slot to other students.

Emergency situations — such as sudden illness, family emergencies, or unforeseen circumstances — are reviewed on a case-by-case basis. If a client needs to cancel due to an emergency, they should contact us as soon as possible. We will work with them to reschedule or apply a credit where appropriate.

Refund Eligibility

Clients may request a full refund within 72 hours (3 days) of purchase, provided that:

  • No sessions have been booked or completed, and
  • No package credits have been used.

All refunds are subject to a 10% administrative fee to cover payment processing and administrative costs.

When Refunds Are Not Available

Refunds are not issued under the following circumstances:

  • More than 72 hours have passed since the purchase date.
  • One or more sessions from the package have been booked (even if not yet completed).
  • Any credits or hours have been used.

After the 72-hour window, all sales are final. Unused credits remain valid for six months from the date of purchase and can be applied to any available subject and tutor.

How to Request a Refund

Clients requesting a refund should contact Tklesson support at info@tklesson.com or call +1-226-975-7070. The request must include:

  1. The client's full name.
  2. The email address associated with their account.
  3. The date of purchase and package type (Bronze, Silver, Gold, or hourly credits).
  4. The reason for the refund request.

Refund requests are processed within 5–10 business days after approval and are returned to the original payment method where possible.
